arguments.research_goal: Live MCP observability/load probe linger75-miss call 1. Assess result quality, provider flow, latency, warnings, and telemetry correlation.

results.snippet: MCP middleware is a FastMCP-specific concept and is not part of the official MCP protocol specification. This middleware system is designed to work with FastMCP servers and may not be compatible with other MCP implementations.
results.title: MCP Middleware - FastMCP
